---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

A clear description of the problem or limitation you're experiencing.
Example: "I find it frustrating that I can't..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Context

- Does this align with the project's **privacy-first, local-only** approach?
- Which part of the app would this affect? (Income, Expenses, Overview, Accounts, Import/Export, etc.)
- Would this require changes to the database schema?

## Additional Information

Any mockups, examples, or references that help illustrate the feature.
